Books

Things I've read that stuck with me.

Thinking, Fast and Slow

Daniel Kahneman

Changed how I think about decision-making under uncertainty.

The Innovator's Dilemma

Clayton Christensen

Why good companies fail at the worst moment.

Stubborn Attachments

Tyler Cowen

The case for taking long-run growth seriously.
